info.title: AnyHarness Runtime API
info.description: Local sidecar runtime for managing coding agent installations, credentials, and ACP sessions.

200.description: List all supported agents with readiness state

400.description: Agent not installable or not found
Replay is disabled or not paused

404.description: Repo root or file not found

400.description: Revision is not ready or max rounds reached

200.description: Created session with live ACP actor
Session config option applied or queued

parameters.name: after_seq
parameters.description: Return only events with seq greater than this value

404.description: Session or pending prompt not found
Session or pending prompt not found

parameters.name: after_seq
parameters.description: Return only raw notifications with seq greater than this value

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path relative to repo root

200.description: Current pull request for the active branch
Destroyed the old workspace source materialization

ConfigApplyState.description: Whether a live config change was applied immediately or queued for later.

GetSessionLiveConfigResponse.description: Response payload for fetching the current live session config snapshot.

oneOf.description: Current live session config snapshot, if the runtime has observed one.

ModelEntry.description: A known model in the AnyHarness catalog for a given provider.

id.description: Session-level model ID exposed by the harness (e.g. "opus[1m]")

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default model for the provider

ModelRegistry.description: Backend-owned model registry for a harness.

defaultModelId.description: Default session-level model selector ID for this harness

kind.description: Which agent this registry is for

ModelRegistryModel.description: A model row in the backend-owned registry for a given harness.

description.description: Optional descriptive copy surfaced in launch/settings UIs

id.description: Session-level model selector ID accepted by the harness

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default model for the registry

NormalizedSessionControl.description:
A product-normalized live session control derived from raw ACP config options.

This is the product semantics layer used by clients to render consistent
controls such as model, mode, reasoning, effort, and fast mode across
different harnesses.

currentValue.description: Currently selected raw value identifier, if any.

key.description: Product-level semantic key such as `model`, `mode`, `reasoning`, or `effort`.

label.description: Human-readable control label shown to users.

rawConfigId.description:
Identifier sent back when mutating this control.

This is usually the raw ACP config option identifier, but compatibility
controls may use a reserved synthetic identifier such as `mode`.

settable.description: Whether the control currently exposes more than one selectable value.

values.description: Selectable values currently available for this control.

NormalizedSessionControlValue.description:
A normalized selectable value for product-facing live session controls.

This intentionally remains distinct from `RawSessionConfigValue` even though
the current shapes are similar. The normalized layer is expected to evolve
independently from the raw ACP wire shape as product-facing control metadata
grows over time.

value.description: Stable raw value identifier to send back when mutating this control.

NormalizedSessionControls.description: The normalized live session controls currently recognized by AnyHarness.

oneOf.description: Normalized collaboration-mode selector, if exposed by the active session.
Normalized reasoning effort/intensity selector, if exposed by the active session.

extras.description: Additional live controls not mapped into the standard normalized set.

oneOf.description: Normalized fast-mode selector, if exposed by the active session.
Normalized mode selector, if exposed by the active session.
Normalized model selector, if exposed by the active session.
Normalized reasoning on/off style control, if exposed by the active session.

OriginContext.description:
Advisory provenance metadata for workspace and session records.

Origin is a read-model hint. It is not authoritative for authorization,
billing, mutability, sandbox ownership, MCP inheritance, or policy.

ProviderConfig.description:
Provider-level configuration metadata describing which models AnyHarness
intentionally exposes for this agent.

kind.description: Which agent this config is for

RawSessionConfigOption.description:
A raw ACP session configuration option as exposed by the active session.

This is the transport-fidelity layer. It should match the live ACP state as
closely as possible without applying product-specific interpretation.

category.description: Optional ACP semantic category such as `model`, `mode`, or `thought_level`.

description.description: Optional description supplied by the agent.

options.description: Selectable raw values currently exposed by the agent.

type.description: Input control type for this option.

RawSessionConfigValue.description: A raw selectable value exposed by an active ACP session configuration option.

description.description: Optional description supplied by the agent.

value.description: Stable ACP value identifier used when setting this option.

SessionConfigOptionType.description: Supported ACP session configuration input types.

SessionLiveConfigSnapshot.description:
The current live session configuration snapshot persisted by AnyHarness.

This contains both the exact raw ACP config state and AnyHarness's
normalized control view for convenient client rendering.

normalizedControls.description: Product-normalized view of the current live controls.

promptCapabilities.description: Content block capabilities advertised by the active ACP agent.

rawConfigOptions.description: Exact raw ACP config options currently exposed by the active session.

sourceSeq.description: Session event sequence number from which this snapshot was produced.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this snapshot was last updated.

SetSessionConfigOptionRequest.description: Request payload for changing a single live session config option.

configId.description: Raw ACP config option identifier to mutate.

value.description: Raw ACP value identifier to apply.

SetSessionConfigOptionResponse.description: Response payload for changing a single live session config option.

applyState.description: Whether the change was applied immediately or queued for later application.

oneOf.description: Latest known live config snapshot after the change was applied or queued.

session.description: Updated session summary after accepting the change.

displayName.description:
New display name. `null` or an empty string clears the override and
restores the default branch- or repo-derived label.
